title: logon timeout
text: logon timeout Set the number of seconds to wait for a successful logon before yielding. USYS$ Mnemonic _PARAMS = logon timeout : Seconds USYS$ Mnemonic _PARAMS = logtime : Seconds Use Applies to Mnemonic Connector Syntax MS SQL connector MSS USYS$MSS_PARAMS Description If this setting is not specified, the logon time expires after 32 seconds.
